differential_diagnoses: Factitious disorder (self-inflicted insulin resistance or injection site manipulation)
next_steps: Test for anti-insulin receptor antibodies (Type B insulin resistance evaluation)
Quantify serum insulin and C-peptide levels during an episode of hyperglycemia
Perform a witnessed, strictly monitored insulin administration protocol to rule out factitious behavior
Order genetic panel for lipodystrophy-associated mutations (e.g., LMNA, PPARG)
Biopsy subcutaneous injection sites to check for insulin-derived amyloidosis
Measure serum IGF-1 and growth hormone levels
Test for anti-insulin antibodies (binding and neutralizing)
